tests_verify_behavior_not_text.reason: The first 7 tests (test_snapshot_target_type_exists through test_fire_event_calls_without_nonnull_assertion) are purely text-matching: they read files and check for exact string patterns like 'type SnapshotTarget = ...' in content. test_not_tautological.reason: All fail-to-pass tests are string-matching assertions. A stub that simply writes the expected strings into the files (e.g., appending 'type SnapshotTarget = HTMLElement | DocumentFragment | HTMLCollection | NodeList | Node[]' as a comment) without actually implementing the type system changes could pass the f2p tests. The behavioral tests (tsc, eslint) are pass-to-pass, not fail-to-pass.

behavior_in_tests.reason: The instruction requires type safety fixes in setupAfterEnv.ts, focusTest.tsx, and package.json changes.
